input.code:
# Load required packages
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Load counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1)

# Convert to integer matrix (DESeq2 requires integer counts)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
counts <- matrix(as.integer(counts), nrow=nrow(counts), ncol=ncol(counts), 
                 dimnames=list(rownames(counts), colnames(counts)))

# Ensure metadata factor is ordered
metadata$cell_type <- factor(metadata$cell_type, levels=c("Monocyte", "T_cell"))

print(paste0("Counts: ", nrow(counts), " genes x ", ncol(counts), " cells"))
print(paste0("Metadata:"))
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                               colData = metadata,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

print("DESeqDataSet created")
